calibrated_delivery.external_runtime: none; PyLabRobot public interface used as a source reference

optical_measurement.external_runtime: none; PyLabRobot public interface used as a source reference

optical_microscopy.external_runtime: OpenFlexure server revision d26b93e1, external GPL-3.0 process via public API

thermal_control.external_runtime: none; PyLabRobot public interface used as a source reference

measurement_unit: nonblank non-comment source lines plus declared checks and classes
person_time_limitation: Source size, physical checks, failure classes, and external dependencies are measured from repository artifacts. Person-hours are unavailable because work-time logging was not active for the original families or the full microscope integration. Do not infer labor from Git timestamps.

prospective_execution_window.description: Wall-clock from expanded-protocol freeze to completion of the fresh-session locked OpenFlexure capture and 2,700-case verifier battery. This is execution latency, not authoring labor and excludes simulator selection, adapter development, and calibration.
